# task-scaffold-cli — Scaffold CLI project
status: done  priority: 1  scope: scope-cli

Create the initial project skeleton and CLI entrypoint for Waystation in Bun + TypeScript.

## Acceptance
- The project defines a runnable waystation CLI entrypoint (run via bun).
- bun:test and Biome (lint/format) are configured.
- A placeholder CLI runs locally (e.g. waystation --version).
- The project has test, typecheck (tsc --noEmit), and lint/check scripts.
